title: Liquid AI Cookbook Tour
description: Explore the Liquid AI Cookbook — a collection of examples and tutorials for building local AI applications with LFM models and the LEAP SDK

steps.title: Welcome to the Cookbook
steps.description: The Liquid AI Cookbook contains 16 ready-to-run examples and 7 fine-tuning notebooks for building AI applications that run locally — no cloud required. The two main areas are examples/ (applications) and finetuning/ (model customization).

steps.title: Audio & Voice Applications
steps.description: These examples showcase LFM audio models for speech recognition, voice chat, and real-time transcription. Includes a voice-controlled car cockpit demo, a CLI transcription tool, browser-based WebGPU audio, and a voice chat interface.

interactiveActions.description: Explore the audio car cockpit example

steps.title: Vision & Document Processing
steps.description: Vision-language models power these examples: extract structured data from invoices, identify car makes from photos, caption video in real-time with WebGPU, and automate browser interactions using visual understanding.

steps.title: Agents & Reasoning
steps.description: These examples demonstrate tool-calling, multi-step reasoning, and autonomous agents. The flight search assistant shows tool use with reasoning, the local coding assistant runs on-device, and the meeting agents handle transcription and analysis.

steps.title: Creative & Cross-Platform
steps.description: Creative applications combining multiple modalities: a browser game controlled by hand gestures and voice, a Korean-English translator, and an iOS app built with the LEAP SDK for native mobile deployment.

steps.title: LocalCowork — Full-Stack AI Agent
steps.description: The most sophisticated example in the cookbook. LocalCowork is a complete desktop AI agent built with Tauri 2.0 (Rust) + React, featuring 75+ tools across 14 MCP servers, a dual-model orchestrator, and human-in-the-loop confirmations. It demonstrates production-grade patterns for local AI applications.

steps.title: Fine-Tuning Resources
steps.description: Seven Jupyter notebooks cover the full spectrum of model customization: supervised fine-tuning (SFT) with Unsloth and TRL, vision-language model fine-tuning, GRPO reinforcement learning for reasoning, and continued pre-training for translation and domain knowledge.

steps.title: Start Exploring
steps.description: You've seen the full landscape of the Liquid AI Cookbook! Each example is self-contained with its own README, dependencies, and build instructions. Pick an area that interests you — audio, vision, agents, or fine-tuning — and dive in. Check the main README.md for setup guides and links to documentation.
